en: And Jesus, full of the Holy Spirit, returned from the Jordan and was led by the Spirit in the wilderness
zh: 耶穌被聖靈充滿，從約旦河回來，聖靈引他到曠野，

en: for forty days, being tempted by the devil. And he ate nothing during those days. And when they were ended, he was hungry.
zh: 四十天受魔鬼的試探。那些日子他甚麼也沒有吃，日子滿了他就餓了。

en: The devil said to him, "If you are the Son of God, command this stone to become bread."
zh: 魔鬼對他說：“你若是 神的兒子，就吩咐這塊石頭變成食物吧！”

en: And Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'Man shall not live by bread alone.'"
zh: 耶穌回答：“經上記著： ‘人活著不是單靠食物。’”

en: And the devil took him up and showed him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time,
zh: 魔鬼引他上到高處，霎時間把天下萬國指給他看，

en: and said to him, "To you I will give all this authority and their glory, for it has been delivered to me, and I give it to whom I will.
zh: 對他說：“這一切權柄、榮華，我都可以給你；因為這些都交給了我，我願意給誰就給誰。

en: If you, then, will worship me, it will all be yours."
zh: 所以，只要你在我面前拜一拜，這一切就全是你的了。”

en: And Jesus answered him, "It is written, "' You shall worship the Lord your God, and him only shall you serve.'"
zh: 耶穌回答：“經上記著： ‘當拜主你的 神， 單要事奉他。’”

en: And he took him to Jerusalem and set him on the pinnacle of the temple and said to him, "If you are the Son of God, throw yourself down from here,
zh: 魔鬼又引他到耶路撒冷，叫他站在殿的最高處，對他說：“你若是 神的兒子，就從這裡跳下去吧！

en: for it is written, "' He will command his angels concerning you, to guard you,'
zh: 因為經上記著： ‘他為了你，會吩咐自己的使者保護你。’

en: and "'On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.'"
zh: 又記著： ‘用手托住你， 免得你的腳碰到石頭。’”

en: And Jesus answered him, "It is said, 'You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.'"
zh: 耶穌回答：“經上說：‘不可試探主你的 神。’”

en: And when the devil had ended every temptation, he departed from him until an opportune time.
zh: 魔鬼用盡了各種試探，就暫時離開了耶穌。

en: And Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit to Galilee, and a report about him went out through all the surrounding country.
zh: 耶穌帶著聖靈的能力，回到加利利。他的名聲傳遍了周圍各地。

en: And he taught in their synagogues, being glorified by all.
zh: 他在各會堂裡教導人，很受眾人的尊崇。

en: And he came to Nazareth, where he had been brought up. And as was his custom, he went to the synagogue on the Sabbath day, and he stood up to read.
zh: 耶穌來到拿撒勒自己長大的地方，照著習慣在安息日進入會堂，站起來要讀經。

en: And the scroll of the prophet Isaiah was given to him. He unrolled the scroll and found the place where it was written,
zh: 有人把以賽亞先知的書遞給他，他展開書卷找到一處，上面寫著：

en: "The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to proclaim good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim liberty to the captives and recovering of sight to the blind, to set at liberty those who are oppressed,
zh: “主的靈在我身上， 因為他膏我去傳福音給貧窮的人， 差遣我去宣告被擄的得釋放， 瞎眼的得看見， 受壓制的得自由，

en: to proclaim the year of the Lord's favor."
zh: 又宣告主悅納人的禧年。”

en: And he rolled up the scroll and gave it back to the attendant and sat down. And the eyes of all in the synagogue were fixed on him.
zh: 他把書卷捲好，交還侍役，就坐下。會堂裡眾人都注視他。

en: And he began to say to them, "Today this Scripture has been fulfilled in your hearing."
zh: 他就對他們說：“這段經文今天應驗在你們中間 了。”

en: And all spoke well of him and marveled at the gracious words that were coming from his mouth. And they said, "Is not this Joseph's son?"
zh: 眾人稱讚他，希奇他口中所出的恩言，並且說：“這不是約瑟的兒子嗎？”

en: And he said to them, "Doubtless you will quote to me this proverb, 'Physician, heal yourself.' What we have heard you did at Capernaum, do here in your hometown as well."
zh: 他說：“你們必向我說這俗語：‘醫生，治好你自己吧！’也必說：‘我們聽見你在迦百農所行的一切事，也該在你本鄉這裡行啊！’”

en: And he said, "Truly, I say to you, no prophet is acceptable in his hometown.
zh: 他又說：“我實在告訴你們，沒有先知在他本鄉是受歡迎的。

en: But in truth, I tell you, there were many widows in Israel in the days of Elijah, when the heavens were shut up three years and six months, and a great famine came over all the land,
zh: 我對你們說實話，當以利亞的時候，三年六個月不下雨 ，遍地大起饑荒，那時以色列中有許多寡婦，

en: and Elijah was sent to none of them but only to Zarephath, in the land of Sidon, to a woman who was a widow.
zh: 以利亞沒有奉差遣往他們中間任何一個那裡去，只到西頓撒勒法的一個寡婦那裡。

en: And there were many lepers in Israel in the time of the prophet Elisha, and none of them was cleansed, but only Naaman the Syrian."
zh: 以利沙先知的時候，以色列中有許多患痲風的人，其中除了敘利亞的乃縵，沒有一個得潔淨的。”

en: When they heard these things, all in the synagogue were filled with wrath.
zh: 會堂裡的眾人聽見這話，都怒氣填胸，

en: And they rose up and drove him out of the town and brought him to the brow of the hill on which their town was built, so that they could throw him down the cliff.
zh: 起來趕他出城 ，他們拉他到山崖，要把他推下去。

en: But passing through their midst, he went away.
zh: 耶穌卻從他們中間走過，就離去了。

en: And he went down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee. And he was teaching them on the Sabbath,
zh: 耶穌下到加利利的迦百農城，在安息日教導人。

en: and they were astonished at his teaching, for his word possessed authority.
zh: 他們對他的教訓都很驚奇，因為他的話帶著權柄。

en: And in the synagogue there was a man who had the spirit of an unclean demon, and he cried out with a loud voice,
zh: 會堂裡有一個被污鬼附著的人，大聲喊叫：

en: "Ha! What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are- the Holy One of God."
zh: “哎！拿撒勒人耶穌，我們跟你有甚麼關係呢？你來毀滅我們嗎？我知道你是誰，你是 神的聖者。”

en: But Jesus rebuked him, saying, "Be silent and come out of him!" And when the demon had thrown him down in their midst, he came out of him, having done him no harm.
zh: 耶穌斥責他說：“住口！從他身上出來！”鬼把那人摔倒在眾人中間，就從他身上出來了，沒有傷害他。

en: And they were all amazed and said to one another, "What is this word? For with authority and power he commands the unclean spirits, and they come out!"
zh: 眾人都驚駭，彼此談論說：“這是怎麼回事？他用權柄能力吩咐污靈，污靈竟出來了。”

en: And reports about him went out into every place in the surrounding region.
zh: 耶穌的名聲，傳遍了周圍各地。

en: And he arose and left the synagogue and entered Simon's house. Now Simon's mother-in-law was ill with a high fever, and they appealed to him on her behalf.
zh: 他起身離開會堂，進入西門的家。西門的岳母正在發高熱，他們為她求耶穌。

en: And he stood over her and rebuked the fever, and it left her, and immediately she rose and began to serve them.
zh: 耶穌站在她旁邊，斥責那熱病，熱就退了；她立刻起身服事他們。

en: Now when the sun was setting, all those who had any who were sick with various diseases brought them to him, and he laid his hands on every one of them and healed them.
zh: 日落的時候，不論害甚麼病的人，都被帶到耶穌那裡；他一一為他們按手，醫好他們。

en: And demons also came out of many, crying, "You are the Son of God!" But he rebuked them and would not allow them to speak, because they knew that he was the Christ.
zh: 又有鬼從好些人身上出來，喊著說：“你是 神的兒子。”耶穌斥責他們，不許他們說話，因為他們知道他是基督。

en: And when it was day, he departed and went into a desolate place. And the people sought him and came to him, and would have kept him from leaving them,
zh: 天一亮，耶穌出來，到曠野地方去。眾人尋找他，一直找到他那裡，要留住他，不要他離開他們。

en: but he said to them, "I must preach the good news of the kingdom of God to the other towns as well; for I was sent for this purpose."
zh: 他卻說：“我也必須到別的城去傳 神國的福音，因為我是為了這緣故奉差遣的。”

en: And he was preaching in the synagogues of Judea.
zh: 於是他往猶太的各會堂去傳道。
